title: The Davy Back Fight Challenge
description: Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Unless... you are not a man and...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Want to go back on your words...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: idiot, don't fall for his trap!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hang on... the bullet is almost out...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Our captain is proposing the game...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: to your captain as we speak.

summary: Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.
